race.comment: UNRIDDLE (18) filled another quinella placing when 1.5 lengths adrift over 1100m at Pakenham. Was beaten 1L at Ballarat prior, and this looks a touch easier. Will position forward from a handy barrier and deserves another chance. SPIRIT OF GAIA (14) didn't have the best of it at Pakenham but had just missed the three prior, including in town. She's a solid each-way hope with average luck in running. BACK UP BARBIE (7) resumes and showed enough at Stony Creek on debut to seriously consider. Raced new and didn't have the best of luck. Will be naturally improved, and she was placed in a recent Pakenham jump-out. TAMATOA (6) debuts and has looked good at the jump-outs. Draws inside, and a bold run is likely from him as well.
